breaking.title: U.S. launches more strikes on Iran as standoff over Strait of Hormuz escalates
breaking.summary: A U.S. official said a few strikes were conducted on missile and air defence systems and paramilitary Revolutionary Guard boats at a couple of locations to further degrade Iran's ability to attack commercial shipping

breaking.title: U.S. airstrikes hit northern Iran as it disables ship trying to run blockade
breaking.summary: Iran retaliates with missile and drone attacks on Bahrain, Jordan and Kuwait, authorities in those countries home to U.S. forces said

breaking.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
breaking.summary: The ex-head of Italy's motorway operator Giovanni Castellucci was handed a 12-year term over the 2018 bridge collapse.

breaking.title: Fresh Floods, Landslides Hit 5 Districts In Arunachal Pradesh
breaking.summary: Fresh floods and landslides were reported in Arunachal Pradesh, damaging houses, roads and crops, officials said on Thursday.

breaking.title: Iran tells Houthis to close Red Sea gateway if U.S. hits power network: report
breaking.summary: A source close to the Houthis said the group had completed preparations to attack ‌shipping by deploying missiles and drones near Bab el-Mandeb strait, the gateway to the Red Sea, in Yemen’s highlands overlooking Hodeidah ‌and ⁠the Gulf of Aden and was awaiting the order to begin

breaking.title: 5 Of Family Killed After Scooter Crashes Into Parked Tractor In Chhattisgarh
breaking.summary: A case was registered, and an investigation was underway, police said.

breaking.title: Iran threatens to block more vital seaways as Trump orders renewed Iran blockade
breaking.summary: The ​latest threat to global shipping comes after ‌the U.S. military said it began a fresh round of strikes “to continue degrading Iranian capabilities used to attack commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz”

breaking.title: What is Greater Tunb Island, the strategic point in the Strait of Hormuz targeted by U.S. airstrikes?
breaking.summary: Greater Tunb is a small island in the Persian Gulf near the entrance to the Strait of Hormuz and is regarded as a strategically important location in the strait
